name: Reborn from the Ashes
overview: After being reborn as Su Qingran, a noblewoman betrayed and killed in her past life returns to seek justice for herself and her family. Fate brings her into a political marriage with Wanyan Jin, a man burdened by his own deep-seated vendetta. Though initially wary of each other, they join forces to uncover the truth, avenge their families, and find love as they fight side by side.
